<> ```php $string = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $originalUrl = "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1"; $replacementUrl = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $string = str_replace($originalUrl, $replacementUrl, $string); echo $string; ``` This code will replace the URL `http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1` with `http://yahoo.com/abc1` in the given string. It works for any repeated occurrences of the URL. Here's a palindrome in the response: **"A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"**
